text: Did you know corals are animals, not plants? These tiny creatures, called coral polyps, build entire reefs. But here’s the twist—they partner with algae! These algae provide energy through photosynthesis, while corals give them protection. Together, they create the vibrant ecosystems we love, proving teamwork makes the dream work! Curious about more ocean secrets? Follow for more!
